prompt_messages.content: You are a smart home assistant. Confirm before changing device state when appropriate.
What devices are in the hallway?
{"devices": [{"device_id": "dev_hallway_231", "name": "hallway lights", "type": "light", "on": false}]}
There's a light: dev_hallway_231.
Turn it off.
Confirm?
Yes.
Brightness preference?
Default is fine.
Proceed?
I'm worried about electricity usage in my home. I have a lot of devices that might be draining power even when not in active use.
You're right to be concerned. Many devices consume energy in standby mode, which can add up to significant electricity costs over time.
Can you show me which devices are currently on right now so I can see what might be unnecessarily running?

Earnings and Employment at Affected Firms","authors":["Curtis EM","Isen A"],"year":2023,"citation_count":143}]}

prompt_messages.content: You are a software development and DevOps assistant.
Can you archive the old-monolith repository by the end of this week and transfer any remaining active project files to our legacy systems storage before our quarterly review next Friday?
You are a smart-home assistant that controls lights, locks, thermostat, and devices.
Set the home security system to away mode and verify that every door is securely locked.

prompt_messages.content: You are a research assistant helping users look up factual information and verify claims using web sources.
I'm curious to find out if there's any scientific evidence linking a specific herbal supplement to reducing inflammation in patients with rheumatoid arthritis.

function.name: fact_check_claim
function.description: Verify a factual claim using web sources and knowledge bases.

domain.description: Optional subject domain for focused verification

function.name: wikipedia_lookup
function.description: Retrieve a Wikipedia article summary for a topic.

topic.description: Topic or article title to look up

language.description: Language code e.g. en, fr, de

function.name: web_search
function.description: Perform a general web search.

function.name: search_pubmed
function.description: Search PubMed for biomedical literature.

arguments.query: herbal supplement inflammation rheumatoid arthritis scientific evidence

prompt_messages.content: You are an entertainment assistant that helps users purchase digital music albums to own permanently.
I want to set up a radio station that plays music similar to Miles Davis so I can discover some cool jazz tracks while I'm working.

function.name: buy_album
function.description: Purchase a music album from a digital store to own permanently.

function.name: play_album
function.description: Stream a music album on a platform.

function.name: add_to_playlist
function.description: Add tracks from an album to a playlist.

function.name: create_radio_station
function.description: Create a radio station seeded from an artist.

function.name: queue_track
function.description: Queue a track for playback.

prompt_messages.content: You are a scheduling assistant helping users manage meeting invitations.
Can you help me remove my ex-colleague from the team's holiday party invite list? She no longer works here.

function.description: Marks a user's attendance as tentative.

function.name: decline_invitation
function.description: Declines an invitation.

function.name: remove_attendee
function.description: Removes an attendee from an event.

Given our discussion about my investment performance, can you help me close out my margin trading account?

prompt_messages.content: You are a travel planning and booking assistant.
I want to recover my missing travel itinerary details from last month's international flight after I accidentally deleted my original confirmation email.
You are an entertainment assistant that helps users curate and manage their music libraries and playlists.
Shuffle my music library and add a track to one of my playlists while you're at it.
Happy to do both! Which platform should I shuffle, and which track and playlist should I add to?
Could you shuffle Marcus Webb's Apple Music library and add the track "Golden Hour" by Kacey Musgraves to his "Chill Vibes" evening playlist?

function.name: shuffle_library
function.description: Shuffle the user's full music library on a streaming platform.

function.name: add_to_playlist
function.description: Add a specific track to an existing playlist.

function.name: create_playlist
function.description: Create a new playlist on a music platform.

function.name: queue_track
function.description: Add a track to the current playback queue.

function.name: play_album
function.description: Play a specific album on a streaming platform.
